summary: 70 cartridge-bullet weight mismatches from resolver bug
Lapua G573 weight stored as 180gr, should be 120gr
Hornady International cartridges with metric units stored as imperial (barrel 61cm→61in, velocity 721 m/s→721 fps, barrel 9.45 unexplained)
7 Hornady International/ECX cartridges with muzzle_velocity_fps = 0 (pages don't publish velocity)
28 rifle bullets (diameter <= .375) missing all BC fields, excluding Cutting Edge and Nosler
.204 Ruger 24gr NTX at 4400 fps exceeds 4200 fps threshold (plausible for 24gr Superformance)
Sierra 22 CAL 60 GR TMK appears twice — identical name, one missing BC data
